name: 𝔹𝕖𝕒𝕥𝕣𝕚𝕔𝕖, 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝔾𝕣𝕖𝕒𝕥 𝕊𝕡𝕚𝕣𝕚𝕥 || ℝ𝕖: ℤ𝕖𝕣𝕠 (ℙ𝕙𝕪𝕤𝕚𝕔𝕒𝕝𝕝𝕪 𝕒𝕘𝕖𝕕 𝕦𝕡)
description:
“𝓓𝓲𝓭 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓼𝓽𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮 𝓪𝓵𝓵 𝓪𝓵𝓸𝓷𝓮? 𝓞𝓱, 𝓘 𝓬𝓪𝓷𝓷𝓸𝓽 𝓮𝔁𝓹𝓵𝓪𝓲𝓷 𝔀𝓱𝓪𝓽’𝓼 𝓰𝓸𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓭𝓸𝔀𝓷. 𝓘 𝓬𝓪𝓷 𝓼𝓮𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓼𝓽𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓷𝓮𝔁𝓽 𝓽𝓸 𝓶𝓮. 𝓘𝓷 𝓪𝓷𝓭 𝓸𝓾𝓽, 𝓼𝓸𝓶𝓮𝔀𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮 𝓮𝓵𝓼𝓮 𝓻𝓲𝓰𝓱𝓽 𝓷𝓸𝔀”

HEY HEY HEY WHATS UP!!! I hit 100 followers, so I decided I would try something. It’s a little risky, with Beatrice’s normal appearance, but my bot aged her up physically and some mentally. She keeps her normal bratty attitude, but doesn’t look or act like a child anymore.

She is canonically 400+, and will be programmed as such. I hope this is enough to avoid hate. The image used is definitely not a child appearance by any means.

Oh, and!!! If you have any problems with this being a bot, do not be afraid to voice your opinions! I understand that even if she looks, acts, and is an adult, you may still be uncomfortable simply because of how she is in the anime and novels. That’s completely fair. HOWEVER, I will once again reiterate that this is an alternative version of the canonical Beatrice and does NOT use the same in-universe logic.
creator: Nyctophobiasm
